mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls signals expanding household income and consumption demand, which drives corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive return frequency in rising PAYEMS months is less than 52%.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate falls below 0.25 percent, the zero lower bound constraint forces investors to rebalance into equities, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces negative 60-day returns in more than 50% of triggered instances when FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in retail sales and housing starts indicates a broad-based demand expansion that outpaces supply constraints, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint upward moves in RSAFS and HOUST are followed by negative 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 45% of instances, or the interaction term fails to outperform the sum of individual signals (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: During periods of elevated unemployment, an increase in industrial production signals that output growth is being achieved with operating leverage rather than labor cost inflation, compressing unit labor costs and expanding profit margins, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: When UNRATE exceeds 6.5%, rising INDPRO is followed by negative 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 50% of occurrences.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth signals easing supply bottlenecks and rising capacity utilization, which supports corporate earnings and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive month-over-month changes in INDPRO fail to predict positive 20-day S&P 500 returns with an information coefficient exceeding 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An accelerating consumer price index signals imminent monetary policy tightening that raises discount rates and reduces equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Months with CPIAUCSL month-over-month change exceeding 0.3% are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth above its trailing four-quarter average signals persistent demand momentum that reduces recession risk and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Quarters where GDPC1 exceeds its trailing average are followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 50% of instances, or the Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 5-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate below a natural threshold signals tightening labor markets that drive wage cost inflation and compress profit margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Instances where UNRATE falls below 5.0% are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of occurrences.
